caption: A man is seated at a long, polished wooden desk in what appears to be a formal assembly or government chamber, characterized by wood-paneled walls. He is dressed in a light-colored long-sleeved shirt paired with a beige Nehru vest featuring a white pocket square. He sits behind a desk equipped with a microphone, a glass of water, and several red folders. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains a steady gaze toward someone off-camera to his left, wearing a subtle, composed smile. His hands rest on the desk in front of him. The background consists of vertical wooden panels and a teal-colored upholstered chair partially visible behind him. There are no changes in the setting, clothing, or his general posture; the video captures a brief moment of him listening or reacting with a calm expression.
